prompt: Create a realistic vertical outdoor portrait photo on a quiet summer golden shower tree avenue. A young woman with short black bob hair wears a wide white headband, a fitted white long-sleeve crop top with shoulder cutout straps, a high-waisted white pleated tennis skirt, white crew socks, and chunky white sneakers. She is seated sideways on a dark wooden park bench on the right side of the frame, leaning back slightly with both hands resting on the bench, legs extended diagonally toward the lower left, face softly blurred or anonymized. The setting is a peaceful sidewalk beside a gently curving empty road, covered with fallen yellow petals. Overhead, dense hanging clusters of golden shower tree blossoms form a vivid yellow canopy across the top of the image, with more yellow-flowered trees receding into the background. Use shallow depth of field, soft natural daylight, creamy bokeh, muted green and gray background tones, and a dreamy editorial fashion-photography mood. Compose in a 2:3 vertical frame, subject placed on the right third, road and sidewalk leading lines fading into the left background. No text, no watermark, no extra people, no vehicles, no harsh shadows.
